adminReportingFoundation.reason: Provides woreda polygons used to clip and aggregate all upper-level pixel values because MfM reports exactly at Admin 3 level.

populationSafeguardFoundation.reason: Population-density rasters help prevent restoration planning on livelihood-critical smallholder farmland.

datasets.nextStep: Add GFW geostore or bulk raster workflow for ADM3 aggregation.
datasets.reason: Provides ready-to-use metrics for historical tree loss and canopy condition, allowing degradation extent to be shown without custom image processing.

datasets.nextStep: Select DEM tiles, derive slope, then aggregate steep-slope share by ADM3.
datasets.reason: Provides wall-to-wall elevation data for slope and erosion exposure, helping prioritize steep, landslide-prone watershed areas.

datasets.nextStep: Replace centroid samples with zonal summaries per ADM3.
datasets.reason: Provides soil chemistry baselines such as pH and soil organic carbon, reducing the risk of recommending trees on severely unsuitable soils.

datasets.nextStep: Locate a stable download/API or curate a species-climate table from the atlas.
datasets.reason: Links native tree species to suitable climate zones, giving a fast and defensible proxy for biodiversity-oriented restoration fit.

datasets.nextStep: Use a Protected Planet account/token or approved WDPA export, then aggregate protected-area adjacency by ADM3.
datasets.reason: Protected-area polygons allow adjacent degraded areas to receive corridor bonus points for wildlife connectivity.

datasets.nextStep: Replace ADM1 bounding-box counts with polygon-clipped records and apply spatial sampling-bias correction before final scoring.
datasets.reason: Species observations are strong ecological indicators, but require correction for spatial sampling bias near roads and accessible areas.

datasets.nextStep: Download raster to data/raw and compute population-density summaries per ADM3.
datasets.reason: Acts as the primary safeguard by using population density to avoid placing restoration on critical smallholder agricultural land.
Provides the woreda polygons needed to clip, aggregate and report all raster and vector indicators at MfM's management level.

datasets.nextStep: Join exact ADM3 population records to the current 2025 ADM3 boundaries and calculate LI per woreda.
datasets.reason: Provides projected sex and age disaggregated ADM3 population statistics that make Livelihood Impact measurable instead of purely static.

datasets.nextStep: Find a public PSNP works endpoint or receive a project dataset from MfM/government partners.
datasets.reason: Checks existing public investments in watersheds so MfM can avoid duplicating government-funded work.
